# Project Definition

## 1. Goal

Describe the primary outcome this project exists to achieve.

## 2. Initial Scope

Describe the first release scope and what is intentionally included now.

## 3. Product Scope

Describe the broader intended product scope beyond the initial release.

## 4. Non-Goals

Describe what this project intentionally does not solve.

## 5. Success Criteria

Describe how the project will be evaluated as successful.
